title: Society of the Snow
posterAlt: Society of the Snow (2023) movie poster
tmdbOverview: On October 13, 1972, Uruguayan Air Force Flight 571, chartered to take a rugby team to Chile, crashes into a glacier in the heart of the Andes.
synopsis: Society of the Snow (2023) is a drama and history film from Spain and United States. It holds a solid 7.8 rating on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a R certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
